/* Generated by EPP 1.0beta3 (by lisp-epp1.0beta3) */

class Testassert {
  public static void main(String args[]){
    int a = 2; 
    System.out.println((div(10, 2)) == (5)); 
    try {
      div(10, 0); 
      } catch (Error e) {
      } 
    }
  
  static int div(int x, int y){
    if (!((y) != (0))) {
      System.err.println("Assertion failed.:Testassert.java:16:"); 
      throw new Error("Assertion faild."); 
      } else ;; 
    return (x) / (y); 
    }
  }
